title: Process Engineer Vacancy at EPC Industrie - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at EPC Industrie - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? EPC Industrie in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About EPC Industrie:
EPC Industrie is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EPC Industrie!
